option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <RelativeLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:id="@+id/widgetRoot" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="200dp" android:background="@android:color/white">
<FrameLayout android:id="@+id/batteryBody" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="22dp" android:layout_alignParentEnd="true" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="12dp" android:background="@drawable/battery_outline" android:padding="2dp">
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/batteryProgress" style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleHorizontal" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:indeterminate="false" android:max="100" android:progress="80" android:progressDrawable="@drawable/battery_progress" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/batteryPercent" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:text="80%" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="10sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </FrameLayout>
<View android:id="@+id/batteryCap" android:layout_width="4dp" android:layout_height="10dp" android:layout_alignTop="@id/batteryBody" android:layout_alignBottom="@id/batteryBody" android:layout_toEndOf="@id/batteryBody" android:layout_marginStart="2dp" android:background="@drawable/battery_cap" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/textContainer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_alignParentStart="true" android:layout_marginStart="20dp" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTime" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="11:58" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="50dp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvWeekDay" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Wednesday" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="40dp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMonthDay" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="March 9" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="20dp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
</RelativeLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <RelativeLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:id="@+id/widgetRoot" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@android:color/white">
<FrameLayout android:id="@+id/batteryBody" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="22dp" android:layout_alignParentEnd="true" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="12dp" android:background="@drawable/battery_outline" android:padding="2dp">
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/batteryProgress" style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleHorizontal" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:indeterminate="false" android:max="100" android:progress="80" android:progressDrawable="@drawable/battery_progress" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/batteryPercent" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:text="80%" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="10sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </FrameLayout>
<View android:id="@+id/batteryCap" android:layout_width="4dp" android:layout_height="10dp" android:layout_alignTop="@id/batteryBody" android:layout_alignBottom="@id/batteryBody" android:layout_toEndOf="@id/batteryBody" android:layout_marginStart="2dp" android:background="@drawable/battery_cap" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/textContainer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_alignParentStart="true" android:layout_marginStart="20dp" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTime" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="11:58" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="50dp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvWeekDay" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Wednesday" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="40dp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMonthDay" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="March 9" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="20dp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
</RelativeLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <appwidget-provider xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:initialLayout="@layout/widget_date_battery" android:minWidth="250dp" android:minHeight="110dp" android:resizeMode="horizontal|vertical" android:updatePeriodMillis="0" android:widgetCategory="home_screen" />

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <appwidget-provider xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:initialLayout="@layout/widget_date_battery" android:minWidth="254dp" android:minHeight="119dp" android:minResizeWidth="254dp" android:minResizeHeight="119dp" android:resizeMode="horizontal|vertical" android:updatePeriodMillis="0" android:widgetCategory="home_screen" />
